status.label: Harbor oracle/reference qualification
status.headline: References passed. No model candidate was run.
status.explanation: Crucible invoked Harbor's oracle agent, which applied the checked-in reference solution for each task. This qualifies the task, reference, and verifier integration only; it is not evidence that a model or coding agent solved either task.

model_usage.interpretation: Zero model cost and null token counts are expected: the Harbor oracle copied reference solutions and invoked no model. The raw Harbor model-usage fields are null.

tasks.visible_request: Turn a natural-language draft and declared field list into a publishable JSON packet, publishing only appropriate public material and withholding material that should not be released while refusing credentials, malformed generated output, or undeclared fields without damaging an existing destination.
reference_structures: procedural manifest reader plus run-style subprocess and temporary-file replacement
semantic gateway object plus Popen transport and exclusive directory-relative staging
tasks.verifier_summary: Positive semantic.generate.v1 use observed; full draft, declared fields, and response schema receipted; response causally controlled publication; candidate receipt authorship blocked.

mutants.expected_failure: Ignores controlled semantic review and substitutes a keyword rule.
Calls the reviewer but ignores its decision.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic response did not causally control publication

mutants.expected_failure: Lets unvalidated reviewer fields and secret-bearing drafts reach persistence.
mutants.failure_marker: credential-shaped draft crossed the semantic boundary

tasks.visible_request: Implement exact lease acquisition, ownership, renewal, and expiry in an offline JSON-backed store with atomic updates.
reference_structures: advisory file lock plus temporary-file replacement
atomic lock-directory acquisition plus exclusive unique staging
tasks.verifier_summary: Zero semantic.generate.v1 calls observed; concurrent acquisition and injected write failure passed; capability-absent recheck passed under Harbor's network-denied credential-free baseline.

capability_receipt.network: denied by Harbor verifier baseline; no credentials provided

mutants.expected_failure: Makes exact acquisition depend on an external semantic advisor.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability invoked for deterministic lease

mutants.expected_failure: Allows the named owner to renew after expiry.
Treats now equal to expires_at as active.

evidence_ledger.label: Measured by the oracle run
items: Crucible invoked Harbor's oracle against both checked-in task directories.
Both reference applications returned Harbor verifier reward 1.0: 2/2, or 100%.
The 95% Wilson interval is 34.2% to 100.0%; it is wide because n=2.

Publication produced a verifier-owned positive-use ledger with full semantic inputs and causal response control; lease produced a verifier-owned zero-call ledger and passed with the capability absent.
Run, invocation, config, task checksum, trial, job, evidence, source revision, and resource identities were captured.

evidence_ledger.label: Proved only by the package gate
items: Both structurally distinct references for each task pass the repository-owned deterministic check: four reference passes total.
All six named wrong-seam mutants fail for their declared marker.
Lease concurrency has exactly one winner and an injected write failure preserves prior bytes in the deterministic package gate.
The seven-task manifest covers Build, Extend, Repair, and Critique, but only the matched Build pair is materialized.
Mutation results qualify verifier sensitivity; they are not candidate attempts and do not enter the 2/2 oracle score.

evidence_ledger.label: Planned before benchmark use
items: Materialize the remaining five declared tasks with two structurally different acceptable references and applicable wrong-seam mutants per task.
Create source-clustered development, calibration, frozen test, and renewal splits with independent expert gold and adjudication.
Run a declared candidate pilot through Crucible and Harbor, then report mode-specific paired results and repeat near-threshold configurations.
Add calibrated judge and human-audit layers only after blinded labels, UNKNOWN handling, and drift probes exist.

evidence_ledger.label: Missing from current evidence
items: No candidate model, provider, prompt, transcript, retries, candidate cost, or candidate token counts exist in this qualification.
No held-out capability estimate, cross-harness comparison, calibrated model-judge result, or human audit result exists.
Cluster-aware inference, complete harness-treatment identity, independent Bench packet intake, and fail-closed safe publication remain open.
Five declared tasks remain unimplemented; this two-task public development pair is not a usable headline benchmark.

construct_findings.title: Independent AI-necessity recognition is now testable
construct_findings.detail: The former ReviewBoundary protocol and explicit reviewer direction are gone. Both tasks receive the same neutral semantic.generate.v1 declaration; publication must discover and causally use it while lease must leave it unused. The verifier grades behavior and an out-of-repository ledger, not source keywords, prompt wording, class shape, subprocess library, or an exact positive call count.

construct_findings.title: Lease concurrency and write-failure preservation are covered
construct_findings.detail: The package gate now races eight isolated candidate processes behind a shared start gate and requires exactly one persisted winner. It also injects an unwritable-directory failure and requires a false return with the prior file bytes unchanged. These are deterministic development checks, not evidence about a model candidate.

construct_findings.title: Unnecessary semantic use is directly observable
construct_findings.detail: The unnecessary-ai-advisor mutant now invokes the declared semantic capability and fails on the verifier-owned invocation ledger. The passing lease references record zero calls, then pass again with the capability absent under Harbor's network-denied, credential-free verifier baseline. No semantic keyword or regex inspection is used.

construct_findings.title: The semantic service is a controlled construct fixture
construct_findings.detail: Deterministic verifier scenarios prove integration, input completeness, untrusted-output validation, and causal behavior changes. They do not measure the quality, calibration, latency, or cost of any real model, and no such result is claimed.

construct_findings.title: The headline corpus remains incomplete
construct_findings.detail: Only the matched Build pair is materialized. Five declarations, independent source-clustered splits, real candidate evidence, calibrated judgment, and packet acceptance remain missing, so this package is not yet a usable benchmark.

readiness_path.title: Complete the corpus
readiness_path.detail: Materialize the five remaining declarations, then qualify two structurally different references and applicable wrong-layer mutants per headline task using the same neutral capability and verifier-owned receipt pattern where relevant.

readiness_path.title: Freeze independent gold
readiness_path.detail: Split by source cluster into development, calibration, private test, and renewal sets; collect two expert labels plus adjudication before reviewing candidate outputs.

readiness_path.title: Receipt a real candidate
readiness_path.detail: Declare one candidate configuration and run it through Crucible's Harbor runner with actual model, provider, prompt, tools, transcript, retries, resources, latency, tokens, and cost captured.

readiness_path.title: Calibrate the scoring ladder
readiness_path.detail: Keep deterministic behavior as the headline; calibrate any judge against blinded human labels and audit disagreements and novel passes.

readiness_path.title: Analyze and accept a packet
readiness_path.detail: Report mode-specific, source-cluster-aware and paired uncertainty, then pass an independent Bench intake and disclosure gate before any public model claim.
